strategicDirection.oneLine: Stop page-only progress; create the next verified replacement candidate from live runtime evidence.
notDoing: Do not count new pages as agentization progress by themselves.
Do not close improvement work without runtime evidence and verification commands.
Do not move hard human gates into autonomous execution.

summary.primaryDirection: 라이프 에이전트화를 scope 단위에서 domain 단위로 승격

bottlenecks.direction: Create at least one domain promotion candidate from scoped replacement evidence.
Split human-only gates from delegatable safe actions.
Increase real search/citation/reuse events instead of adding static pages.
Keep collaboration/runtime drift checks in the improvement loop.

actions.title: 라이프 에이전트화를 scope 단위에서 domain 단위로 승격
actions.routeRationale: P1 life-agentization promotion is tracked by #211 with life_information_loop execution evidence and Claude read-only review.
actions.objective: Life Graph에서 replacement-ready domain이 0개가 아니라 최소 1개 이상으로 보입니다.
actions.whyNow: 현재 domainReplacementPercent=10%, scopeReplacementPercent=37.5%입니다. 실제 업무 대체 목표에는 domain-level evidence가 필요합니다.
nextConcreteActions: Turn raise-life-agentization-from-scoped-to-domain into a bounded implementation task with evidence
Update public runtime artifacts so the user can see the delta
Run verification commands and leave a PR/issue comment with evidence
actions.successMetric: visible runtime metric or artifact changes without page-only progress
actions.safetyBoundary: 대체율을 올리려면 실제 입력 데이터와 반복 실행 evidence가 필요합니다.

actions.title: LLM-Wiki 검색/재사용 ROI evidence 늘리기
actions.routeRationale: LLM-Wiki ROI/reuse evidence belongs with the open knowledge-vault review lane #98; codex owns implementation and Claude reviews knowledge quality.
actions.objective: LLM-Wiki Readiness와 Knowledge Retrieval 페이지에서 ROI 샘플 수가 증가합니다.
actions.whyNow: LLM-Wiki readiness=84%이고 global cap이 남아 있습니다. 지식관리 체계가 “보이는 지도”에서 “실제로 재사용되는 시스템”으로 가려면 검색/인용/재사용 event가 더 필요합니다.
nextConcreteActions: Turn increase-llm-wiki-roi-evidence into a bounded implementation task with evidence
Update public runtime artifacts so the user can see the delta
Run verification commands and leave a PR/issue comment with evidence
actions.successMetric: visible runtime metric or artifact changes without page-only progress
actions.safetyBoundary: 의미 있는 ROI는 실제 사용 이벤트가 쌓여야 하므로 단발성 샘플 생성만으로는 부족합니다.

actions.title: Needs Human 결정 묶음을 더 줄이고 자동 위임 후보를 분리
actions.routeRationale: Decision bottleneck reduction builds on the completed live decision digest lane #184; collaboration_auditor_cli is the reviewer for handoff/duplicate-work risk.
actions.objective: Agent Map v10에서 이미 batch 단위로 보이며, 다음 개선은 자동 위임/보류/승인 후보를 더 분리하는 것입니다.
actions.whyNow: 현재 needsHuman=3, decisionQueue=5, decisionBatches=3입니다. 결정 항목이 흩어지면 사용자가 계속 확인 병목이 됩니다.
nextConcreteActions: Turn reduce-decision-bottleneck into a bounded implementation task with evidence
Update public runtime artifacts so the user can see the delta
Run verification commands and leave a PR/issue comment with evidence
actions.successMetric: visible runtime metric or artifact changes without page-only progress
actions.safetyBoundary: 실제 결정 자체는 사용자/Codex 책임이므로 자동 승인으로 대체하지 않습니다.

actions.title: 외부 기술/경제 신호를 KST 일일 이슈 브리프로 승격
actions.routeRationale: External signal briefing UX builds on #174; uiux_cli reviews the visible daily-brief presentation contract.
actions.objective: 기본 페이지에 오늘/어제/최근 7일로 분리된 Daily Issue Brief 카드가 보입니다.
actions.whyNow: external prioritySignals=8, high=2입니다. 현재는 rolling signal이고, 사용자가 기대하는 것은 일일 판단 구간입니다.
nextConcreteActions: Turn turn-external-signals-into-daily-issue-brief into a bounded implementation task with evidence
Update public runtime artifacts so the user can see the delta
Run verification commands and leave a PR/issue comment with evidence
actions.successMetric: visible runtime metric or artifact changes without page-only progress
actions.safetyBoundary: 원문 본문을 수집하지 않는 안전 경계를 유지하므로 제목 기반 신호 해석임을 표시해야 합니다.
